narrative:
Louisville City has 6,262 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a modest Republican lean of 5.3 percentage points.
